arts.sum: Empoli are coming from a 3-2 defeat to Atalanta in the previous round, which left them five points clear of the relegation zone. On the other hand, Genoa's improved efforts in the second half on Satu...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Empoli v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the curtain falls on 2024, Empoli and Genoa prepare to face off in a pivotal Serie A encounter at the Stadio Carlo Castellani on Saturday afternoon. Both sides enter the match looking to bounce back from recent defeats against title contenders, with Empoli narrowly losing to league leaders Atalanta and Genoa falling to Napoli. The post Serie A | Empoli v Genoa: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
